Off Calendar Dec-29-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO THE ORANGE COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT [C.C.P. 396B] AND THE IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCATIONS; MEMORANDUM OF POINT AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF ANGELO A. DUPLANTIER

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The parties have filed a joint stipulation to transfer venue and submitted a proposed order granting joint stipulation to transfer venue. The court will execute the proposed order. With that, the motion will be ordered off calendar.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
